examples: The view from the top was breathtaking.
The Grand Canyon is truly breathtaking.
I'm definitely coming to the party.
This is definitely the best pizza I've ever had.
You should definitely try the cheesecake.
context: In my opinion, it is definitely underrated.

examples: I was exhausted after the long hike.
She looked exhausted from working overtime.
The kids were exhausted after playing all day.
context: I'm exhausted. It was so hard to roll out of bed.

examples: I feel really motivated to study English.
What keeps you motivated every day?
context: I'm going to hang this on my wall, and hopefully it keeps me feeling inspired, motivated, and it helps me reach all of my 2026 goals.

examples: Try to see things from a different perspective.
Living abroad changed my perspective on life.
context: This says, make decisions from the perspective of who you want to become.
